findings.title: AWS access key ID
findings.recommendation: Remove the secret from source, rotate it immediately, and load it from an environment variable or secret manager.

findings.title: Use of eval()
findings.recommendation: Avoid eval(); parse input explicitly or use ast.literal_eval for literals.

findings.title: Use of exec()
findings.recommendation: Avoid exec() on dynamic input; it allows arbitrary code execution.

findings.title: Use of eval()
findings.description: `"Avoid eval(); it enables code injection. Use JSON.parse / explicit logic."),`
findings.recommendation: Avoid eval(); parse input explicitly or use ast.literal_eval for literals.

findings.title: Use of exec()
findings.recommendation: Avoid exec() on dynamic input; it allows arbitrary code execution.

findings.title: subprocess called with shell=True
findings.recommendation: Pass an argument list and shell=False to avoid command injection.

findings.title: Direct innerHTML assignment (possible XSS)
findings.recommendation: Use textContent or a sanitizer; avoid injecting unescaped HTML.

findings.title: Direct innerHTML assignment (possible XSS)
findings.description: `body.innerHTML = `No findings for the selected severities. ✔`;`
findings.recommendation: Use textContent or a sanitizer; avoid injecting unescaped HTML.

findings.title: Unsafe yaml.load()
findings.recommendation: Use yaml.safe_load() to avoid arbitrary object construction.

findings.title: Weak hash algorithm (MD5/SHA1)
findings.recommendation: Use SHA-256+ for integrity, and a KDF (bcrypt/argon2) for passwords.
